$shuffle_seed_derivation: int(md5(b'10.1').hexdigest(), 16) % 2**32 — first 8 hex chars of md5('10.1') = a87ff679 = 2827239033
length_bias_fix: revision 2 — correct answers shortened to ~20 words core claim; distractors expanded to match; longest_correct_rate reduced to ≤0.40

questions.objective_ref: Describe what happened in documented AI-in-admissions cases — what the AI was asked to do, what it actually did, and where the human check was absent or ineffective.
Identify the specific point in an admissions pipeline where a human override should have been required but was not.
Apply the Judgment Framework (Q1–Q3) to the admissions case and explain what each question reveals about the failure.
Explain how automation bias contributed to the missing override point.
Name at least two governance controls — concrete rules or processes — that would have caught the failure before it caused harm.
Write a short post-mortem identifying the governance gap in a described AI-assisted decision. (Tested via applied scenario MCQ per standard profile.)
